message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series.count + Series.nunique (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests to live_oracle_dataframe_series_core
covering Series.count and Series.nunique scalar reductions:

- count_basic (mixed nulls), count_no_nulls (utf8 index), count_all_nulls
- nunique_basic, nunique_with_duplicates, nunique_with_nulls

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
scalar, runs the Rust implementation, and asserts parity via
compare_scalar. SeriesCount and SeriesNunique were already present in
FixtureOperation and the Scalar response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap noted by the multi-pass review cycle.

[bd-frankenpandas-09gwe]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
